# Generated by scripts/generate-autobahn-lock.nu
# Regenerate with: just autobahn-lock
#
# This lock covers the exact third-party PyPI sdist artifacts used by
# the native Autobahn TestSuite PyPy runtime.
# unittest2 and its transitive backports are omitted here because they
# do not install cleanly on PyPy 2.7; a tiny bootstrap shim satisfies
# Autobahn's indirect unittest2 imports during wstest startup.
# autobahntestsuite itself is installed separately from the pinned source tree.

# Automat-22.10.0.tar.gz
